properties.title: Industrial Environmental and Emissions Safety Compliance (Section 12)
properties.regulatory_ref: EPA Code 40 CFR / ASME Section I
properties.description: Compliance limits governing safety valve operations, leak tolerances, and boiler pressure vessels.
